IClientPropertyValidReferencedTables Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns a list of referenceable tables by a dynamic foreign key.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Dto
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public DynamicFkRefTable[] ValidReferencedTables { get; set; }

Property Value

Type: DynamicFkRefTable
Remarks
If this property is null, all tables are valid reference targets.
